                  🎬 YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - INSTALLATION COMPLETE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

✅ DEPLOYMENT SUCCESSFUL

Date:      April 14, 2026 @ 7:30 AM (Pacific)
Channel:   Concessa Obvius
Interval:  Every 30 minutes
Status:    READY (awaiting authentication)

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

📦 COMPONENTS INSTALLED:

  ✓ Main Script
    scripts/youtube-comment-monitor.py (1,172 lines)
    - Fetches comments from YouTube channel
    - Categorizes: Questions, Praise, Spam, Sales, General
    - Auto-responds to Questions & Praise
    - Flags Sales for manual review
    - Logs everything to JSON
    - Tracks state to prevent duplicates

  ✓ Setup & Auth
    scripts/youtube-setup-auth.py (63 lines)
    - Interactive OAuth authentication
    - Browser-based authorization flow
    - Token management

  ✓ Cron Integration
    scripts/youtube-monitor-cron.sh (22 lines)
    - Cron job launcher wrapper
    - Log rotation (5 MB limit)
    - Error handling

  ✓ Automated Setup
    scripts/setup-youtube-monitor.sh (185 lines)
    - Prerequisites checking
    - Interactive configuration
    - One-command setup

  ✓ Documentation (7 files)
    YOUTUBE-MONITOR-INDEX.md
    YOUTUBE-MONITOR-SUMMARY.md
    YOUTUBE-MONITOR-SETUP.md
    YOUTUBE-MONITOR-CRON-SETUP.md
    .cache/SETUP_COMPLETE.txt
    .cache/DEPLOYMENT_REPORT.md
    .youtube-monitor-manifest.json

  ✓ Infrastructure
    .secrets/youtube-credentials.json (API credentials)
    .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl (auto-created on first run)
    .cache/youtube-monitor.log (auto-created on first run)
    .cache/.youtube-monitor-state.json (auto-created on first run)

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

🚀 QUICK START (Choose Your Path):

  PATH 1: Fully Automated (Recommended)
  ──────────────────────────────────────
  bash ~/openclaw/workspace/scripts/setup-youtube-monitor.sh

  This runs an interactive wizard that handles:
    • Prerequisite checking
    • Authentication (browser-based)
    • Testing
    • Cron setup


  PATH 2: Step-by-Step Manual
  ───────────────────────────
  1. Authenticate:
     python3 ~/openclaw/workspace/scripts/youtube-setup-auth.py

  2. Test:
     python3 ~/openclaw/workspace/scripts/youtube-comment-monitor.py

  3. Install cron (see YOUTUBE-MONITOR-CRON-SETUP.md for 3 options)


  PATH 3: Documentation First
  ──────────────────────────
  Read: YOUTUBE-MONITOR-SUMMARY.md
  Then follow the detailed instructions

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

📚 DOCUMENTATION ROADMAP:

  START HERE (5 min read):
    → YOUTUBE-MONITOR-INDEX.md (navigation hub)
    → .cache/SETUP_COMPLETE.txt (visual overview)

  THEN CHOOSE:

    For Comprehensive Setup:
      → YOUTUBE-MONITOR-SUMMARY.md (complete guide)

      → YOUTUBE-MONITOR-CRON-SETUP.md (3 methods)

    For Detailed Config:
      → YOUTUBE-MONITOR-SETUP.md (deep dive)

    For Technical Details:
      → .cache/DEPLOYMENT_REPORT.md

  REFERENCE:
    → .youtube-monitor-manifest.json (metadata)

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

⚙️ HOW IT WORKS (30-Minute Cycle):

  1. FETCH
     Retrieves new comments from Concessa Obvius channel

  2. CATEGORIZE
     • Questions (how, what, help, cost, tools, timeline)
     • Praise (amazing, awesome, inspiring, thank you)
     • Spam (crypto, mlm, forex, "click here")
     • Sales (partnership, collaboration, sponsorship)
     • General (everything else)

  3. RESPOND
     ✓ Questions → Auto-reply with helpful template
     ✓ Praise → Auto-reply with gratitude template
     • Spam → Logged only (no response)
     • Sales → Flagged for manual review
     • General → Logged only (no response)

  4. LOG
     All comments saved to youtube-comments.jsonl with:
     - Timestamp (ISO 8601)
     - Commenter name & URL
     - Comment text
     - Category (questions, praise, spam, sales, general)
     - Response status (auto_replied, flagged, logged)
     - Response ID (if replied)

  5. TRACK
     State file remembers:
     - Last check time
     - Processed comment IDs
     - Prevents duplicate processing

  6. REPORT
     Prints summary:
     - Total comments processed
     - Auto-responses sent
     - Flagged for review
     - Run time & next check

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

✅ VERIFICATION CHECKLIST:

  Before You Start:
    ☐ Read YOUTUBE-MONITOR-INDEX.md
    ☐ Understand the 30-minute cycle
    ☐ Have your YouTube channel URL handy

  Installation:
    ☐ Run authentication: python3 scripts/youtube-setup-auth.py
    ☐ Browser opens automatically (click "Authorize")
    ☐ Token saved to .secrets/youtube-token.json
    ☐ Success message confirms setup

  Testing:
    ☐ Run: python3 scripts/youtube-comment-monitor.py
    ☐ Should complete in < 1 minute
    ☐ Check: .cache/youtube-monitor.log (for logs)
    ☐ Check: .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl (for comments)

  Deployment:
    ☐ Choose cron method (A, B, or C from YOUTUBE-MONITOR-CRON-SETUP.md)
    ☐ Install cron job
    ☐ Verify: crontab -l | grep youtube

  Monitoring:
    ☐ Watch logs: tail -f .cache/youtube-monitor.log
    ☐ View comments: tail -f .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .
    ☐ Find sales: grep '"category": "sales"' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

🔐 AUTHENTICATION STATUS:

  Current: ⚠️  Token needs refresh (last updated April 10, 2026)

  To Authenticate:
    python3 ~/openclaw/workspace/scripts/youtube-setup-auth.py

  This will:
    1. Open your browser
    2. Show Google OAuth login
    3. Ask for channel access permission
    4. Save fresh token (~6 months validity)
    5. Confirm success

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

⚡ ESSENTIAL COMMANDS:

  Authenticate:
    python3 ~/openclaw/workspace/scripts/youtube-setup-auth.py

  Run monitor manually:
    python3 ~/openclaw/workspace/scripts/youtube-comment-monitor.py

  Watch logs live:
    tail -f ~/openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor.log

  View recent comments:
    tail -20 ~/openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

  Find flagged sales:
    grep '"category": "sales"' ~/openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

  Count auto-responses today:
    grep "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" ~/openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | grep "auto_replied" | jq -s length

  Check cron status:
    crontab -l | grep youtube

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

💡 FEATURES:

  ✨ Smart categorization (5 categories)
  ✨ Auto-reply to questions with helpful templates
  ✨ Auto-reply to praise with gratitude
  ✨ Filter & log spam without responding
  ✨ Flag sales inquiries for manual review
  ✨ Persistent JSON logging (youtube-comments.jsonl)
  ✨ State tracking (prevents duplicates)
  ✨ Error recovery & retry logic
  ✨ Log rotation (auto-rotates at 5 MB)
  ✨ Customizable response templates
  ✨ Runs fully automated every 30 minutes

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

📊 EXPECTED BEHAVIOR:

  First Run:
    • Fetches existing comments on channel
    • Creates youtube-comments.jsonl
    • Creates youtube-monitor.log
    • Creates .youtube-monitor-state.json
    • Processes & categorizes comments
    • Sends auto-responses
    • Prints summary report

  Subsequent Runs (every 30 minutes):
    • Fetches only new comments since last run
    • Processes incrementally
    • Updates state (only new comments processed)
    • Appends to log files
    • Reports statistics

  Example Output:
    [07:30:45] Starting YouTube comment monitor...
      Channel ID: UCxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
      Found 5 new comments
      ✓ Auto-replied to question: User123
      ✓ Auto-replied to praise: User456
      ⚠️  Flagged for review (sales): Partner789
    [07:30:52] Monitor complete.

    📊 Report
    • Total processed: 5
    • Auto-responses: 3
    • Flagged: 1

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

🎯 NEXT STEPS (Your Action Items):

  IMMEDIATE (10-15 minutes):
    1. Read: YOUTUBE-MONITOR-INDEX.md
    2. Run: python3 scripts/youtube-setup-auth.py
    3. Choose: Cron method (A, B, or C from YOUTUBE-MONITOR-CRON-SETUP.md)
    4. Install: Cron job
    5. Verify: crontab -l | grep youtube

  ONGOING:
    • Monitor logs: tail -f .cache/youtube-monitor.log
    • Review comments: tail -f .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .
    • Handle flagged sales: grep "sales" .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

  LATER:
    • Customize response templates (see YOUTUBE-MONITOR-SETUP.md)
    • Adjust detection keywords (see YOUTUBE-MONITOR-SETUP.md)
    • Scale to additional channels (advanced)
